root.name: insert_bmi_table_task
root.description: Evaluates whether a small table with correct BMI ranges by sex was inserted on slide 3, formatted as specified.

children.name: table_inserted_on_slide_3
children.description: Checks if a table was inserted on slide 3.

children.name: table_content_bmi_ranges_by_sex
children.description: Checks if the table includes 'Male' and 'Female' with correct BMI ranges and formatting (<, >, -).

children.name: table_is_small_and_not_obtrusive
children.description: Checks if the inserted table is reasonably small (not covering most of the slide).

children.name: no_unnecessary_extra_changes
children.description: Checks that no unrelated slides were added, removed, or significantly altered.

metadata.task: Insert a small table on slide 3 showing BMI ranges by sex (Male, Female), using <,> and – to denote ranges.
